opinion.h: WEST v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE APPELLATE DEPARTMENT OF THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES. No. 117. Decided October 10, 1960.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Henry T. Moore, Sr. and Henry T. Moore, Jr. for appellant.
William B. McKesson and Ralph F. Bagley for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
364 U.S. 287 KAHAN ET AL. v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE APPELLATE DEPARTMENT OF THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF LOS ANGELES. No. 130. Decided October 10, 1960.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Roger Arnebergh and Philip E. Grey for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
